use_cases: Displaying geographic locations on an interactive map interface
Allowing users to explore spatial data through panning and zooming
Enabling location-based interactions through clickable markers
Providing map-based navigation for property or business finding
Integrating geographic visualization into dashboards and applications
ai_summary: Larsen66 Map is an interactive geographic data display component that enables users to explore spatial information through an intuitive map interface. Supports standard map interactions including drag panning, scroll zooming, and click-to-reveal marker details. Built for mixed platform deployment across desktop and mobile environments, suitable for SaaS dashboards, real estate platforms, or any application requiring location-based visualization.
